pages.text: $(italic)Supplementaries$() scatters a handful of practical gadgets through the pack — small tools that solve one problem each and ask nothing of any tech tree. None are required; each is worth knowing.
pages.title: Small Gadgets

pages.text: $(bold)For getting around and getting up.$()$(br)$(li)$(bold)Rope$() — string it down a shaft and climb it like a ladder; coil it back up as you go. The fastest way in and out of a cave you dug straight down.$(li)$(bold)Slingshot$() — a cheap launch upward, or a way to fling a stack of items across a gap.$(li)$(bold)Flute$() — whistle your tamed pets to your side from across a base.
pages.title: Getting Around

pages.text: $(bold)For the workshop and the shelf.$()$(br)$(li)$(bold)Bubble Blower$() — fills space with clinging bubble blocks; decorative, and a soft landing.$(li)$(bold)Bombs$() — a thrown, contained blast for clearing stone without a creeper's mess.$(li)$(bold)Sacks, jars, and shelves$() hold and show off what you've gathered.$(br2)$(italic)This is a sampler, not the catalogue — open EMI and search $(bold)Supplementaries$() to see the rest, recipes and all.$()
pages.title: Workshop & Shelf
